Variables.Name: bCastShadowAsMasked
Variables.Description: If true, forces translucency to cast static shadows as if the material were masked.

Variables.Name: EmissiveBoost
Variables.Description: Scales the emissive contribution of this material to static lighting.

Variables.Name: DiffuseBoost
Variables.Description: Scales the diffuse contribution of this material to static lighting.

Variables.Name: ExportResolutionScale
Variables.Description:
Scales the resolution that this material's attributes were exported at.
	  This is useful for increasing material resolution when details are needed.

Variables.Name: bOverrideCastShadowAsMasked
Variables.Description:
Boolean override flags - only used in MaterialInstance cases. 
	 If true, override the bCastShadowAsMasked setting of the parent material.

Variables.Name: bOverrideEmissiveBoost
Variables.Description: If true, override the emissive boost setting of the parent material.

Variables.Name: bOverrideDiffuseBoost
Variables.Description: If true, override the diffuse boost setting of the parent material.

Variables.Name: bOverrideExportResolutionScale
Variables.Description: If true, override the export resolution scale setting of the parent material.
